name: Proxy Travel Bag
summary: The Proxy Travel Bag offers both style and practicality.
description: The Proxy Travel Bag offers both style and practicality. Its design includes a convenient loading tray, a hidden compartment, and 8 pockets. The bag is symmetrical, making it suitable for both left-handed and right-handed users. With a fully adjustable strap, it can fit all body types comfortably. Keeps your kit protected and discreet in transit.
